title_original: Denmark – Agricultural machinery – Rammeaftaler vedrørende anskaffelse og vedligeholdelse af traktorer, havemaskiner, robotplæneklippere og tilbehør
title_english: Denmark - Tractors, Garden Machinery, Robotic Mowers and Trailers for Defence
description_original:
Delaftale 1 vedrører levering og vedligeholdelse af traktorer og påhængsvogne med tilbehør til Forsvaret. Derudover omfatter delaftale 1 tillige vedligeholdelse af Forsvarets "Arv" i form af tilsvarende maskiner, som Forsvaret allerede er i besiddelse af ved indgåelse af aftalen. Delaftale 1 omfatter følgende typer af maskiner, samt tilbehør, vedligeholdelse og reservedele dertil: - Traktor let FLV - Traktor let - Traktor let+ (plus) - Traktor middel - Traktor svær - Blokvogn 24 - Kroghejsvogn 16T - Entreprenørvogn - Påhængsvogn
Delaftale 2 vedrører levering og vedligeholdelse af havemaskiner og vogne med tilbehør til Forsvaret. Derudover omfatter delaftale 2 tillige vedligeholdelse af Forsvarets "Arv" i form af tilsvarende maskiner, som Forsvaret allerede er i besiddelse af ved indgåelse af aftalen. Delaftale 2 omfatter følgende typer af maskiner, samt vedligeholdelse og reservedele dertil: - Mini traktor - Havetraktor - Frontmonteret rotorklipper - Zeroturn - Multimaskine - Redskabsbærer - Varmtvandsanlæg - Armklipper - Skråningsklipper - 1 tons vogn - 2 tonsvogn
description_english: This Danish Defence tender is divided into two lots covering the supply, maintenance, and spare parts for various tractors, trailers, and ground maintenance machinery. **Lot 1** covers tractors of varying weight classes (light FLV, light, light+, medium, and heavy variants) alongside specialized trailers including a 24-tonne block wagon, 16-tonne hook-lift wagon, contractor wagon, and standard trailer; it also includes maintenance of the Defence's existing legacy fleet of equivalent machines. **Lot 2** covers garden and grounds maintenance equipment including mini tractors, garden tractors, front-mounted rotary mowers, zero-turn mowers, multi-machines, implement carriers, hot water systems, arm mowers, slope mowers, and 1-tonne and 2-tonne utility wagons, again including maintenance of the existing legacy fleet. Both lots require suppliers to provide full lifecycle support including maintenance services and spare parts supply to the Danish Defence.
winner:
Danish Agro Maskiner A/S
Danish Agro Maskiner A/S

title_original: Netherlands – Trailers, semi-trailers and mobile containers – EA S&A Levering boottrailers
title_english: Netherlands - Boat trailers for Royal Navy rubber boat transport
description_original: Onderhavige aanbesteding betreft een behoefte vanuit de Koninklijke Marine (CZSK) voor de vervanging van 27 boottrailers en een uitbreiding van het aantal boottrailers met 12 stuks. 39 boottrailers in totaal. Daarbovenop worden 15 boottrailers als optie (elke trailer kan als losse optie worden afgenomen) opgenomen om in specifieke gevallen af te kunnen nemen. De behoefte betreft enkel aanschaf, geen onderhoud. Eventuele standaard garantietermijnen worden wel in stand gehouden. Preventief en correctief onderhoud worden uitgevoerd binnen een andere overeenkomst van Aanbestedende dienst. Het betreft boottrailers voor het vervoer van boten van CZSK. Het gaat om diverse typen boottrailers die worden ingezet voor het vervoer van diverse type rubberboten over land. Rubberboten met harde V bodem, rubberboten met zachte bodem en met inbouw of buitenboord motor.

title_original: Belgium – Trailers and semi-trailers – Acquisition en 2 lots de 99 tracteurs (TRR) et 94 semi-remorques (STRL) territoriaux, commerciaux et déployables et de 18 TRR et 18 STRL opérationnels/protégés et la conclusion d’un contrat ouvert pluriannuel d'assistance technique pour chaque lot
title_english: Belgium - Military Tractors and Semi-trailers Acquisition (99+18 tractors, 94+18 semi-trailers)
description_original:
Lot 1: Acquisition de moyens territoriaux déployables (99 tracteurs et 94 semi-remorques) et conclusion d'un contrat ouvert pluriannuel pour l'assistance technique.
Lot 2: Acquisition de moyens opérationnels (18 tracteurs protégés et 18 semi-remorques) et la conclusion d’un contrat ouvert pluriannuel d'assistance technique.
description_english: Lot 1 covers the acquisition of 99 territorial-deployment tractors and 94 semi-trailers for deployable logistical operations, along with a multi-year open contract for technical assistance and maintenance support. Lot 2 covers the acquisition of 18 protected operational tractors and 18 semi-trailers designed for higher-threat operational environments, also accompanied by a multi-year open technical assistance contract. Together, the programme totals 117 tractors and 112 semi-trailers across both lots, addressing both standard territorial and protected operational mobility requirements for the Belgian Armed Forces.

IVECO DEFENCE VEHICLES

title_original: Sweden – Trailers – Släpkärra för hanteringsvagnar
title_english: Sweden - Trailers for handling vehicles transport
description_original: FMV ska anskaffa släpkärror med totalvikt på 3,5 ton för transport av hanteringsvagnar. Upphandlingen kommer bestå utav två avtal, ett leveranskontrakt (FMV) och ett vidmakthållandeavtal(Försvarsmakten). Giltighetstiden för leveranskontraktet ska vara 3 år med möjlighet till förlängning 2+2 år. Vidmakthållandeavtalet ska ha en giltighetstid på 3 år med möjlighet till förlängning 2+5+5 år. FMV och FM ska vara avropsberättigade på vidmakthållandeavtalet.
description_english: FMV (Swedish Defence Materiel Administration) is procuring trailers with a gross vehicle weight of 3.5 tonnes, designed for transporting handling vehicles. The procurement will result in two contracts: a delivery contract (held by FMV) with an initial validity of 3 years, extendable by 2+2 years, and a maintenance/sustainment contract (held by the Swedish Armed Forces) with an initial validity of 3 years, extendable by 2+5+5 years. Both FMV and the Swedish Armed Forces (FM) will be entitled to place call-off orders under the sustainment contract.

title_original: Netherlands – Repair, maintenance and associated services of vehicles and related equipment – Levering en onderhoud Bergingsvoertuig
title_english: Netherlands - Recovery Vehicle with Semi-trailer for Military Aircraft Transport
description_original: Eén van de taken van het Logistiek Centrum Woensdrecht (LCW) is het transporteren van vliegende wapensystemen, af te stoten vliegtuigen, te plaatsen poortwachters en transport van gecrashte vliegtuigen of onderdelen daarvan. De Bergingsvoertuigen die daarvoor gebruikt worden stammen uit 1978 en zijn ver over de technische en economische levensduur. Daarom heeft het LCW behoefte aan een nieuw bergingsvoertuig / bergingscombinatie. Vanwege de werkwijze van de bergingsdienst CLSK dient het voertuig / de combinatie voorzien te zijn van een autolaadkraan en bestuurd / gereden te kunnen worden door 1 persoon. Daarbij moet het voertuig / de combinatie de gestelde (deels gedemonteerde) militaire vliegtuigen en helicopters kunnen vervoeren. Opsplitsen van de functionaliteiten in meerdere zelfstandige voertuigen / eenheden past niet in de werkwijze van de bergingsdienst. Onderhavige aanbesteding betreft een heraanbesteding. De Aanbestedende dienst heeft reeds eerder een aanbestedingsprocedure (een Europese openbare aanbesteding) gehouden voor onderhavige opdracht. Die aanbesteding is stopgezet en ingetrokken, omdat het bergingsvoertuig niet juist is uitgevraagd. Door de behoefte te specificeren in twee afzonderlijke Programma’s van Eisen, te weten ‘PVE_VAU_TRK 10x4 met autolaadkraan 165tm v1.0’ en ‘PVE_oplegger 200KN diepbed dieplader v1.0’, is de noodzakelijke onderlinge samenhang tussen deze Programma’s van Eisen niet duidelijk gemaakt.

title_original: Romania – All-terrain vehicles – Achizitie de "Cvadriciclu (tip UTV) cu troliu" si "Remorca pentru transport cvadriciclu (tip ATV/UTV)"
title_english: Romania - All-terrain vehicles - Purchase of UTV quad bikes with winch and transport trailers
description_original:
Obiectul achiziției îl constituie furnizarea de „Cvadriciclu(tip UTV) cu troliu” pentru implementarea Proiectului „Creșterea rezilienței la dezastre prin îmbunătățirea pregătirii pentru misiuni de căutare-salvare și asanare a muniției neexplodate” – RESILIENCE, și livrarea acestora la sediul Autorității Contractante (U.M. 0251 București). Pentru familiarizarea cu noi situații desprinse din cele mai bune practici internaționale recente sau cu noi scenarii în care ar putea acționa (dezastru natural produs într-o zonă cu refugiați/ imigranți în mediul urban/rural intens populat, etc.) Jandarmeria Română a constatat nevoia creșterii nivelului de pregătire în managementul riscurilor și prevenirea efectelor unei situații de criză la producerea unor dezastre. Plecând de la această constatare, s-a considerat că este imperios necesar a fi îmbunătățită asigurarea materială pe timpul acțiunilor de limitare a efectelor dezastrelor naturale, inundații. Prin achiziția Cvadriciclurilor (tip UTV) cu troliu, Autoritatea Contractantă dorește să îmbunătățească dotarea unităților militare din cadrul Jandarmeriei Române, pe linia intervenției la producerea unor dezastre naturale. Cvadriciclul (tip UTV) va fi utilizat pentru misiunile specifice Jandarmeriei Române din mediul urban, rural și montan (spații restrânse, nisip, noroi, mlaștini, teren accidentat, obstacole, păduri, șanțuri, diguri, zone, înzăpezite, pante etc.). Operatorii economici interesați pot solicita clarificări/informații suplimentare până în a 18-a zi înainte de termenul de limită de depunere a ofertelor. Autoritatea contractantă va răspunde, în mod clar și competent, tuturor solicitărilor de clarificare/ informații suplimentare cu 11 zile înainte de termenul de depunere a ofertelor
Obiectul achiziției îl constituie furnizarea de ,,Remorcă pentru transport cvadriciclu(tip ATV/UTV)” pentru implementarea Proiectului „Creșterea rezilienței la dezastre prin îmbunătățirea pregătirii pentru misiuni de căutare-salvare și asanare a muniției neexplodate” – RESILIENCE, și livrarea acestora la sediul Autorității Contractante (U.M. 0251 București). Pentru familiarizarea cu noi situații desprinse din cele mai bune practici internaționale recente sau cu noi scenarii în care ar putea acționa (dezastru natural produs într-o zonă cu refugiați/ imigranți în mediul urban/rural intens populat, etc.) Jandarmeria Română a constatat nevoia creșterii nivelului de pregătire în managementul riscurilor și prevenirea efectelor unei situații de criză la producerea unor dezastre. Plecând de la această constatare, s-a considerat că este imperios necesar a fi îmbunătățită asigurarea materială pe timpul acțiunilor de limitare a efectelor dezastrelor naturale, inundații. Prin achiziția Remorcilor pentru transport cvadriciclu (tip ATV/UTV), Autoritatea Contractantă dorește să îmbunătățească dotarea unităților militare din cadrul Jandarmeriei Române, pe linia intervenției la producerea unor dezastre naturale. Remorca va fi utilizată pentru transportul Cvadriciclului (tip UTV), care va fi utilizat pentru misiunile specifice Jandarmeriei Române din mediul urban, rural și montan (spații restrânse, nisip, noroi, mlaștini, teren accidentat, obstacole, păduri, șanțuri, diguri, zone, înzăpezite, pante etc.). Operatorii economici interesați pot solicita clarificări/informații suplimentare până în a 18-a zi înainte de termenul de limită de depunere a ofertelor. Autoritatea contractantă va răspunde, în mod clar și competent, tuturor solicitărilor de clarificare/ informații suplimentare cu 11 zile înainte de termenul de depunere a ofertelor.
description_english: Romania's Gendarmerie seeks to procure UTV-type quadricycles equipped with winches, along with transport trailers, to support the "RESILIENCE" project aimed at improving disaster response and search-and-rescue capabilities. The vehicles will be deployed across urban, rural, and mountainous terrain for natural disaster intervention missions, including operations in sand, mud, swamps, rough terrain, forests, trenches, embankments, snow-covered areas, and steep slopes. The acquisition is intended to enhance the material readiness of Romanian Gendarmerie military units during natural disaster events, particularly flooding scenarios, as well as situations involving refugees or immigrants in densely populated areas. Delivery of all vehicles is required at the Contracting Authority's headquarters at Military Unit 0251, Bucharest.

title_original: Poland – Radar – Śledzący radarowy system pomiarowy
title_english: Poland - Mobile Doppler Radar Tracking System on Trailer
description_original: Przedmiotem zamówienia jest dostawa mobilnego śledzącego radarowego systemu pomiarowego opartego na zjawisku Dopplera którego główne elementy są zintegrowane z przyczepą samochodową do 3,5 t. zapewniającego rejestrację obiektów typu: 155 mm pocisk artyleryjski do minimalnej odległości 50 km. Wymogi i szczegółowy opis przedmiotu zamówienia zostanie wyszczególniony w Specyfikacji Technicznej – załączniki do Specyfikacji Warunków Zamówienia oraz w projektowanych postanowieniach umowy, które Zamawiający przekaże zaproszonym do składania ofert Wykonawcom, którzy spełniają warunki określone w ogłoszeniu.
description_english: The procurement concerns the supply of a mobile Doppler radar tracking and measurement system integrated with a trailer vehicle rated up to 3.5 tonnes. The system must be capable of detecting and tracking 155mm artillery projectiles at ranges of up to a minimum of 50 kilometres. All key system components are to be mounted on and integrated with the trailer platform. Detailed technical specifications will be provided to pre-qualified bidders via a Technical Specification annex attached to the Terms of Reference.

title_original: Fourniture de groupes de soudure sur remorque au profit du 25ème Régiment du génie de l'air (rga) ou du Groupement d'appui aérien aux opérations(GAAO)
title_english: Supply of welding units on trailers for the benefit of the 25th Air Engineering Regiment (RGA) or the Air Operations Support Group (GAAO)
description_original: Fourniture de groupes de soudures sur remorque au profit du 25ème Régiment du Génie de l'Air (RGA) ou du Groupement d'Appui Aérien aux Opérations (GAAO)
description_english: The French Ministry of Defence is seeking suppliers for the provision of welding units mounted on trailers, intended for use by the 25th Air Engineering Regiment (RGA) or the Air Aerial Operations Support Group (GAAO). The equipment is required to support field engineering and air operations maintenance activities conducted by these military units. The trailer-mounted configuration indicates a requirement for mobile, deployable welding capability suitable for operational environments. Full technical specifications, quantities, and delivery requirements will be detailed in the associated procurement documentation.

title_original: fourniture d'abris modulaires déployables de 340m2 minimum à déploiement rapide intégré sur semi-remorque et prestations associées au profit du MINDEF à Versailles
title_english: Supply of deployable modular shelters minimum 340m2 with rapid integrated deployment on semi-trailer and associated services for the benefit of the French Ministry of Defence at Versailles
description_original: Acquisition d'abris modulaires déployables de 340m2 minimum à déploiement rapide intégré sur semi remorque et prestations associées
description_english: The French Ministry of Defence is seeking to procure deployable modular shelter systems with a minimum floor area of 340m² each, designed for rapid integrated deployment directly from semi-trailer vehicles. The shelters must be modular in construction, enabling swift field deployment, and are intended to provide significant covered operational space for military use. The contract also encompasses associated services, which may include maintenance, training, and logistical support related to the shelter systems. This procurement is managed on behalf of the Ministry of Defence and is based in Versailles, France.

title_original: approvisionnement d'un banc de charge résistive de 2500kw sur remorque routière et prestations associées, à Toulon
title_english: Supply of a 2500kW resistive load bank on road trailer and associated services, Toulon
description_original: approvisionnement d'un banc de charge résistive de 2500kw sur remorque routière et prestations associées, nécessaires au maintien en condition opérationnelle des Eléments de la Force Maritime et des Eléments de Force Armées.
description_english: Supply of a 2500 kW resistive load bank mounted on a road trailer, along with associated support services, intended to maintain the operational readiness of French Naval Force elements and Armed Force elements based in Toulon. The load bank will be used to test and validate the electrical generation systems of maritime and military assets. The contract covers both the equipment procurement and related maintenance or technical services necessary to sustain operational capability.

title_original: acquisition de 'système de ciblerie mobile' basé sur l'utilisation d'un véhicule 4x4 de 'gamme commerciale', téléopéré, tractant une remorque supportant une cible, à Bourges
title_english: Acquisition of mobile targeting system based on commercial range 4x4 vehicle, remote-controlled, towing trailer supporting target, at Bourges
description_original: acquisition de systèmes mobiles téléopérés supports de cible et prestations annexes associées (formation, maintien en condition opérationnelle, rechanges et accessoires).
description_english: France's Ministry of Defence is seeking to acquire mobile, remote-controlled target support systems based on commercial 4x4 vehicles capable of towing trailers that carry targets, intended for use at Bourges. The procurement covers the full system including the teleoperated 4x4 platform and associated target-towing trailer hardware. The contract also encompasses ancillary services including operator training, maintenance and sustainment (MCO), spare parts, and accessories. This acquisition supports live-fire or weapons testing activities requiring mobile, remotely operated target presentation systems.

title_original: fourniture d'un générateur hybride solaire sur remorque au profit du groupement aérien d'appui aux opérations (gaao)
title_english: Supply of a hybrid solar generator on trailer for the benefit of the Aerial Support Operations Group (GAAO)
description_original: fourniture d'un générateur hybride solaire sur remorque au profit du groupement aérien d'appui aux opérations (gaao)
description_english: The French Air Force's Aerial Support Operations Group (GAAO) is seeking the supply of a hybrid solar generator mounted on a trailer. The system combines solar power generation with conventional generator technology to provide a mobile, deployable energy solution. The trailer-mounted configuration ensures operational flexibility and transportability for field operations. This procurement supports the GAAO's energy autonomy requirements during aerial support missions.
